children_suspended_twice.description: Number and reported percentage of children suspended exactly twice in census tract 22 in Columbia, South Carolina.

children_suspended_three_or_more.description: Number and reported percentage of children suspended three or more times in census tract 22 in Columbia, South Carolina.

total_sample_size.description: Total number of children found by CDF who had been suspended more than once in the entire census tract 22; the answer highlights this extremely small sample size as the key source of distortion.
